---
name: Provider Plugin Request
about: Request or propose a new AI provider plugin
labels: provider-plugin
assignees: ''
---

## Provider Name

Name of the AI CLI tool or provider.

## Provider Website / Repository

Link to the provider's official site or repo.

## Why This Provider

Why would this provider be valuable to the Mahalaxmi community?

## Are You Willing to Implement It?

- [ ] Yes — I will submit a PR
- [ ] No — requesting someone else implement it

## Additional Context

Any documentation, API details, or examples that would help
with implementation.
